holdings.infoBox: MULL is an equity ETF with a total of 16 individual holdings. The top holdings are Recv Long 2x Mu Trs Nm1 stock at 66.19%, Recv Long 2x Mu Trs Gs1 at 49.18%, Recv Long 2x Mu Trs Ms1 at 38.31%, Graniteshares Long 2X Mu Swap Hsbc at 29.45%, and Recv Long 2x Mu Trs Wf1 at 16.75%.

overview.description: The GraniteShares 2x Long MU Daily ETF (MULL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of Micron Technology Inc. (ticker: MU) stock. MULL was launched on Nov 11, 2024 and is issued by GraniteShares.
